name: Mushrooms En Papillote
recipeIngredient: 6 cloves Garlic, peeled and thinly sliced (about 2 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Place a sheet of aluminum foil on a flat work surface measuring 16 x 18 inches.
3. Wash, dry, and pile the mushrooms in the center of the foil.
4. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the mushrooms, then add garlic slices.
5. Dot with extra-virgin olive oil (about 1 tsp) and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
6. Fold up the sides of the foil to encase the mushrooms securely in a square package.
7. Place the foil package seam-side up on a baking sheet and bake for 45 minutes in a preheated oven at 400°F.
8. Remove from the oven, unwrap, and serve the mushrooms with their juices and a sprinkle of parsley on top.
Total Time: Approximately 1 hour
Yield: Serves 6
